top_opportunities.title: Abstract 271: IL-7-secreting Salmonella synergizes with PD-L1 blockade to induce durable antitumor immune memory.
top_opportunities.rationale: IL-7-secreting Salmonella synergizes with PD-L1 blockade to induce durable antitumor immune memory, addressing CrisPRO's IMMUNOTHERAPY axis.

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 4279: A PSMA-targeted CAR-T cell engineered with a CD16A signaling domain mitigates cytokine output while retaining antitumor activity in prostate cancer models
top_opportunities.rationale: CAR-T cells targeting PSMA with CD16A signaling domain show antitumor activity and reduced cytokine output in prostate cancer models.

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 7782: Cbl-b-Notch1 axis blockers rewire immunosuppressive tumors to drive cytotoxic and anti-angiogenic immune responses
top_opportunities.rationale: Blocking the Cbl-b-Notch1 axis rewires the immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment to mount protective antitumor immune responses.

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 5616: Tumor necrosis factor-alpha armed TCR-T and CAR-T cells for solid tumors provide superior anticancer activity in the absence of toxicity
top_opportunities.rationale: Directly addresses CrisPRO axis IMMUNOTHERAPY with clinical data

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 329: PLK1 inhibitor onvansertib potentiates the antitumor efficacy of trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) and reverses its resistance in therapy-resistant HER2-low breast cancer models.
top_opportunities.rationale: Combination of onvansertib and T-DXd synergistically inhibited the viability of HER2-low breast cancer cell lines, including fulvestrant and CDK4/6i-resistant cells.

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 3444: Spatial profiling of recurrent glioblastoma in a Phase I clinical trial reveals favorable immune remodeling induced by intracerebroventricular CAR T therapy

top_opportunities.rationale: XPO1 is a therapeutic vulnerability in ATRT, directly addressing a CrisPRO axis with clinical data.

top_opportunities.rationale: TSC1-deficient hepatic macrophages reinvigorated antigen-specific CD8+ T cell responses and suppressed HCC progression, addressing the CrisPRO axis of IMMUNOTHERAPY.

top_opportunities.rationale: IGR burden was the most significant covariate for T-cell inflammation in TMB-low cancers, and predicted ICB benefit in clinical trials.

top_opportunities.rationale: KSQ-001EX is a CRISPR/Cas9 engineered TIL therapy with inactivation of the SOCS1 gene to enhance T cell persistence and anti-tumor functionality, directly addressing the IMMUNOTHERAPY axis.

top_opportunities.title: Abstract 7091: DWP216, a TEAD1/2 inhibitor, enhances efficacy of diverse KRAS inhibitors by reversing resistance mechanisms in RAS-dependent cancers
top_opportunities.rationale: DWP216 targets the YAP-TEAD pathway, which is activated in KRAS inhibitor-resistant cancer cells and can be targeted to restore sensitivity to KRAS inhibition.

WRN.key_finding: 30 records, 17 high-fit. CRC (6) and MSI-H cancers dominate. EIK1005 and ETX-880 are lead compounds. Zero clinical trials at AACR = true white space.

PKMYT1.key_finding: Only 5 records, 2 high-fit. Extremely sparse — PKMYT1 is the most underrepresented axis. RP-6306 (Repare) not yet appearing in AACR abstracts. Strongest white space opportunity.

compliance_metrics.verdict: Acceptable quality. 11% ungrounded genes are pathway inferences, not hallucinations. 6% axis FP rate is within tolerance. fit=0.2 inflation reflects genuine weak-relevance records.
